response.justification: Bogdan has extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL-like SQL databases, plus strong architecture and open-source contributions that align with the role's technical needs; however, his title and experience level far exceed 'junior/mid-level', he lacks clear exposure to renewable energy/construction tech domains, and his German language skill is only basic despite high on-site requirements in Berlin.
strengths: Deep TypeScript and React experience across multiple production systems
Proven fullstack ownership from API to UI with clean architecture focus
Strong open-source contributions and DevOps/CI/CD infrastructure experience
concerns: Overqualified with senior/staff titles, may lack junior-level mentorship fit
No explicit mention of Nest.js, PostgreSQL, or renewable energy domain experience
Basic German proficiency conflicts with high on-site presence requirement in Berlin
